title: Machan Peru Madhurey Song Lyrics Madhurey
stanzas:
Machan peru madhura
nee ninnu paaru edhira

Machan peru madhura
nee ninnu paaru edhira
naan rekka katti
parandhu varum
rendu kaalu kudhira(2)

parai addichaa paatu varum
urai adicha aattam varum
katti vellam unna paartha
katterumbu kooda varume

Machan peru madhura
nee ninnu paaru edhira

urumi urumi melam
iva orasa orasa thaazham
koondhal paadham
iva koadi rubaa yezham

udukka udukka iduppe
idhu endha naatu nadappe
thaththalikkum paerazhagu
thakkaali pazha sevappe

ettu katti paaduven
voodu katti aaduven
patti thotti serndhu vandha
palaa kaththi vesuven

naalu nalla naaludaa
nadappathellaam thoolu da
nooru kodi aalu kitta
enna pathi kaeluda

azhagaana mugame
hello hello sugame
suttu viral thottu putta
theepidikkudhu nagame

Machan peru madhura
nee ninnu paaru edhira
naan rekka katti
parandhu varum
rendu kaalu kudhira

Neruppu neruppu kozhi
iva nerungi vandha thozhi
vervayila thee anaikkum
vithaiya kathukodi

aruvi aruvi paaichal
naan unakkul aadum neechal
ala pola naan vilaiyaadinaa
adangaadho undhan kaaichal

pala palakkum chittu da
banarasu pattu da
thangathaale senji vacha
thanjaavooru thattudaa

othaiyaaga oada
oadi vilaiyaadavaa
pathu viral kaathirukku
pandhal onnu poadavaa

azhagaana thirudi
enakkula irudi
konji konji pesikalaam
konja neram porudi..

Machan peru madhura
nee ninnu paaru edhira

parai addichaa paatu varum
urai adicha aattam varum
katti vellam unna paartha
katterumbu kooda varume

seo.title: Machan Peru Madhurey Song Lyrics Madhurey
seo.description: Full Machan Peru Madhurey songs lyrics, Madhurey Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Vidyasagar, Singer(s): Shankar Mahadevan.
seo.keywords: Madhurey, Vidyasagar, Shankar Mahadevan, Machan Peru Madhurey full lyrics, Madhurey songs lyrics, Machan Peru Madhurey lyrics snippets, Machan Peru Madhurey WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Machan Peru Madhurey lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Machan Peru Madhurey celebrates friendship and the joy of togetherness, with lively lyrics that evoke a sense of fun and energy.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Madhurey, this song is featured during a celebratory scene, highlighting the camaraderie among friends and their carefree spirit.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by Vidyasagar, known for their dynamic collaboration in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

Machan Peru Madhurey was released on August 29, 2004, as part of the movie Madhurey.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Machan Peru Madhurey from the movie Madhurey is a vibrant celebration of friendship and joy. With its upbeat tempo and energetic beats, it perfectly encapsulates the spirit of fun and camaraderie among friends. The lively lyrics invite listeners to join in the celebration, making it an ideal choice for parties and festive occasions. This track evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, leaving a lasting impression on its audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Machan Peru Madhurey from the movie Madhurey is an electrifying track that showcases Shankar Mahadevan's powerful vocals paired with Vidyasagar's vibrant music. This song captures the essence of celebration and joy, making it a perfect anthem for any party. Get ready to groove to the infectious beats and lively lyrics that will keep you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Hey friend, look at how sweet you are.
Hey friend, look at how sweet you are. I will come flying like a bird with two legs.
If you beat the drum, the song will come; if you dance, the performance will come. Even the rain will come when I see you.
Hey friend, look at how sweet you are.
The urumi (a traditional instrument) plays, and the rhythm is lively, with the dance steps moving in sync.
This place is lively, and the dance will attract attention; the beautiful tomatoes will be the highlight.
I will sing with eight sticks, dance with a house, and when the dogs come, I will bring many knives.
On good days, everything will go well; if you ask a hundred people about me, what will they say?
With a beautiful face, hello hello, the joy spreads, and when I touch your hand, it ignites the city.
Hey friend, look at how sweet you are. I will come flying like a bird with two legs.
Fire, fire, the chicken comes running; the friend who brings the fire will be the one to sow the seeds.
Like a waterfall, I will dance inside you; if I play, it won't stop your beauty.
Many things will happen, dear Banarasi, if you tie it up, it will be a festival in Thanjavur.
Running fast, playing, will you throw something for the waiting hand?
A beautiful thief inside me will speak softly for a while, and then it will be gone.
Hey friend, look at how sweet you are.
I will come flying like a bird with two legs.
If you beat the drum, the song will come; if you dance, the performance will come. Even the rain will come when I see you.
